title: Reflection Floor reflection group decode & wire
goal: Movements/Reflection: MEASURED hinge-relative perspective is a dead-end (see ROADMAP T-qreflect001 + T-q50a7f2e6). The tail-difference vs GT is dominated by the 'Floor' group — a mirrored copy of the panels on a Z-tilted plane (Color_Solid 1 at m3x3=[4,0,0, 0,0,-4, 0,4,0], y=-540, scale 4x). Decode Motion's floor-reflection semantics: (a) does the reflection re-render the two panel Transitions with the Y-flip built into the transform, or is it a screen-space mirror of the rendered panels? (b) how are the retimemap/opacity of the reflection tied to the panels? (c) is there a fade/glow blend? Structural detector for the fold-rig scenes (see T-q50a7f2e6 evaluator/index.ts decode) already identifies this scene. Cite parser/footage.ts::Reflection floor-color exception. DoD: Reflection >14.23 (measurable), 0 regressions.
